LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - PETITIONER FRANK BROWN'S MOTION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE MOVING PARTY PROVIDED THE COURT WITH A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATIVE OF SUFFICIENT NOTICE AT THE HEARING. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
ORDER CONFIRMING CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Discharged
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Angie Diner, CSR 581. Telephone# 415 748 4030.

Scott Freedman, Esq., appearing for Judgment Creditor. Paul H. Nathan Esq., appearing for Judgment Debtor Everest Mwamba. Michael Keck, Esq., appearing specially for Judgment Debtor Maureen B. Kenney.
Judgment Debtors sworn and examined.
Court ordered parties to conduct examination according to the guidelines provided by the court. Examination of Everest Mwamba is completed. The OEX is discharged without cost persuant to Local Rule 8.9 (E). The OEX as to Judgment Debtor Maureen Kenney will resume on 12/6/2012 at 2:00 PM, pursuant to agreement of counsel.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Continued To Nov-28-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Continued To Nov-28-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Scott A. Freedman, Esq., appearing for Judgment Creditor. Paul H. Nathan, Esq., appearing for Everest Mwamba, Esq., No appearance by or on behalf of Judgment Debtor Maureen B. Kenney. Attorney Michael Kek had a family emergency and was not present this day.
Order of Examination proceeded as to Everest Mwanba. Mr. Mwanba was sworn and examined.
After argument of Respective counsel the court ordered Order of Examination to Maureen B. Kenney and Everest Mwamba to resume on November 28, 2012 at 2:00 PM. Court ordered the following briefing schedule. Opening brief to be filed on or before the close of business of November 13, 2012, responsive brief on or before the close of business of November 20, 2012. Counsel to deliver courtesy copies to Department 514. Proceedings reported by: (514)
